title: 大陸人一路都同本地人爭飯碗

replies.msg:
唔單止150新移民，仲有好多政策俾佢地嚟殖民，包括：
Admission Scheme for Mainland Talents and Professionals Entrants, Technology Talent Admission Scheme Entrants, Immigration Arrangements for Non-local Graduates Entrants, Imported Workers, Mainland students, Quality Migrant Admission Scheme Entrants

https://www.immd.gov.hk/hkt/services/visas/extension_of_stay.html#mainland&firstTab

請大家移步去討論下，保護屬於香港人嘅香港

只要仲有150同iang，真普選都冇用
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區
